setup_pioneer_role.description: Automatically grants a pioneer role to the first 100 members

params.rolle: The role to assign to the first 100 members who joined

selfrole_erstellen.description: Creates a panel where users can assign themselves roles

params.titel: Title of the panel, e.g. 'Choose your roles'
params.rollen: Format: 🎮 Name|RoleID|Description — separate multiple with comma

selfrole_loeschen.description: Deletes an existing self-role panel by message ID

params.panel_id: Message ID of the panel (right-click → Copy ID)

selfrole_liste.description: Shows all active self-role panels on this server

whitelist.description: Manages the list of allowed link domains

params.aktion: Choose action: Add, Remove or Show list

ban.description: Permanently bans a member from the server

params.grund: Reason for the ban (sent via DM)

kick.description: Kicks a member from the server

params.grund: Reason for the kick (sent via DM)

timeout.description: Puts a member in timeout for a specified duration

params.nutzer: The member to put in timeout
params.grund: Reason for the timeout (sent via DM)

warn.description: Warns a member and saves the warning

params.grund: Reason for the warning (sent via DM)

warn_edit.description: Edits or resets the warning count of a user

params.nutzer: The member whose warnings should be edited
params.anzahl: New total warning count (0 = delete all)

userinfo.description: Shows info about a member — admins can view others

params.nutzer: Admins only: member to view (leave empty = your own info)

set_log_channel.description: Sets the channel for moderation logs

params.kanal: Text channel where all moderation actions are logged

set_welcome_channel.description: Sets the channel for welcome messages

params.kanal: Text channel where new members are greeted

set_waiting_room.description: Configures the waiting room for support music

params.kanal: Voice channel where support music plays

setup_verify.description: Creates a message with a verification button

status_config.description: Changes the online status and activity of the bot

params.text: Activity text shown below the bot name

setup_tickets.description: Creates a new support ticket panel

params.supporter_rollen: Roles allowed to handle tickets (mention or ID)
params.kategorien: Categories in format: 'Name|Description', multiple in quotes

ticket_edit.description: Starts the interactive ticket panel edit wizard

params.message_id: ID of the panel message (autocomplete available)

set_language.description: Changes the language of all bot texts and embeds

params.sprache: Language code: 'de' for German, 'en' for English

setup_application.description: Starts the interactive setup wizard for an application panel

params.message_id: Message ID of the panel (right-click → Copy ID)

set_join_roles.description: Starts the interactive auto join roles wizard

modals.ticket_close_placeholder: e.g. Issue resolved, no response received...

selects.status_dnd_desc: Bot appears as do not disturb
selects.delete_type_ph: 🗑️ What do you want to delete?

errors.no_permission_give_role: ❌ I don't have enough permissions to assign this role.
errors.already_claimed: ⚠️ This ticket has already been claimed!
errors.verify_no_permission: ❌ I'm missing the permissions to assign roles.
errors.no_valid_role: ❌ Please provide at least one valid role.
errors.selfrole_panel_not_found: ❌ No self-role panel found with this ID.
errors.no_panels: ℹ️ No self-role panels on this server.
errors.userinfo_no_permission: ❌ You can only view your own information.
errors.whitelist_already_in: ℹ️ `{domain}` is already on the whitelist.
errors.panel_removed_only: ✅ Removed from config (message could not be deleted).
errors.link_not_allowed:
⚠️ {mention}, this link is not allowed!
Allowed sites: {domains}
errors.no_categories: ❌ No valid categories found. Format: `Name|Description` — separate multiple with comma.

success.whitelist_added: ✅ `{domain}` has been added to the whitelist.
success.whitelist_removed: ✅ `{domain}` has been removed from the whitelist.
success.ticket_created_reply:
✅ Your ticket **#{id}** ({category}) was created: {mention}
[Click here to jump to the ticket]({url})
success.ticket_claimed_followup: ✅ {mention} has claimed this ticket and will take care of it.
success.verify_success: ✅ You have been verified and received the role **{role}**!
success.timeout_success: ✅ **{user}** is now in timeout for {minutes} minute(s).
success.warn_edit_reset: ✅ All warns for {mention} have been reset.
success.pioneer_summary: Analysis complete. Here is the summary:
success.application_submitted: ✅ Your application was submitted successfully! We will get back to you.
success.application_panel_created: ✅ Application panel created (ID: `{id}`). Applications will be posted in {channel}.
success.application_accepted: ✅ {mention} has been informed of the acceptance.
success.application_declined: ✅ {mention} has been informed of the decline.
success.app_setup_q_added: ✅ {count} question(s) saved. Add more or finish?
success.wizard_preview_note: 👁️ **Preview** — This is how the application panel will look:
success.selfrole_pick_role_hint: Select a role from the dropdown:
success.delete_wizard_start: Select what you want to delete:

ticket_channel.title: 📂 Ticket Channel: {category}
ticket_channel.desc:
All tickets of category **{category}** are managed here.

⚠️ **Note:** You cannot write here directly. Your ticket will be created as a private thread.

ticket_thread.title: 🎫 Ticket #{id} — {category}
ticket_thread.desc:
Welcome {mention}!

Your ticket has been created. Please describe your issue as **detailed as possible**.
ticket_thread.next_steps_val:
**1.** Describe your issue
**2.** Attach screenshots
**3.** Wait for a supporter

ticket_panel.title: 🎫 Support Tickets
ticket_panel.desc:
Need help?

Select a category from the dropdown menu and we'll assist you as soon as possible! 🙂

dm_ticket_created.title: 🎫 Ticket Successfully Created
dm_ticket_created.desc: your ticket has been created. A supporter will get back to you as soon as possible. Please be patient. 🙂

dm_ticket_claimed.title: 📋 Ticket Claimed
dm_ticket_claimed.desc: your ticket has been claimed by a supporter. You will receive a response shortly. 🙂

dm_ticket_closed.title: 🔒 Ticket Closed
dm_ticket_closed.desc: your ticket has been closed and archived. You can open a new ticket at any time.

log_link.title: 🚫 Link Deleted
log_link.desc: An unauthorized link was removed in {channel}.

log_ban.title: 🔨 Member Banned
log_ban.desc: A member was permanently removed from the server.

log_kick.title: 👢 Member Kicked
log_kick.desc: A member was kicked from the server.

log_warn.title: ⚠️ Warning #{count}
log_warn.desc: A member has been officially warned.

log_warn_edit.title: 🔧 Warnings Edited
log_warn_edit.desc: The warning count was manually adjusted.

dm_ban.title: 🔨 You have been banned
dm_ban.desc: you have been permanently removed from the server. If you believe this is a mistake, please contact an administrator.

dm_kick.title: 👢 You have been kicked
dm_kick.desc: you have been kicked. You can rejoin at any time using an invite link.

dm_timeout.title: ⏳ You have been timed out
dm_timeout.desc: you have been temporarily muted and cannot write on **{server}** until {until}.

dm_warn.title: ⚠️ You have received a warning
dm_warn.desc: you have been officially warned. Please follow the server rules to avoid further consequences.

welcome.title: 👋 Welcome to {server}!
welcome.desc:
Hey {mention}, great to have you here!

Check out the rules and channels and make yourself at home. 🏠

selfrole.list_desc: There are **{count}** panel(s) on this server.

verify_panel.default_desc: Click the button below to verify yourself and gain access to the server.
